differences: Image B has a different color scheme with gold and dark brown pieces, while Image A has natural wood tones.
The chessboard in Image B has a more polished, glossy finish compared to the matte finish in Image A.
The design and shape of the chess pieces in Image B are more stylized and modern compared to the traditional carved look in Image A.
Image B lacks the decorative border and numbering present on the chessboard in Image A.
